layout_pg_en: fixed school rooftop: waist-high tubular steel railing continuous along visible roof edge, small concrete utility shed with vent pipes on left rear casting short shadow, metal access door behind camera-left marked staff-only, rough concrete deck with drainage grate, open sky occupying upper third — same railing height, shed silhouette and horizon line every shot

venue.narrative_tone: 风声与远景放大情绪：适合对峙、坦白或高风险试探；远处教学楼窗户可作为「可能被看见」的伏笔。独处须与信任/冷战状态一致，勿一键写成真空世界。

cg_policy.explicit_hint: 裸露向须严格服从 cg_explicit 与全局数值门槛；天台并非绝对私密。

world_card_summary: 栏杆与风声：台词再轻也会被心跳盖过去。
